meaning: n.连发左轮手枪,旋转者,旋转式装置
examples: He had only seven rounds of ammunition for the revolver.
Putting his revolver aside, he led the trembling child up-stairs.
He has since performed and recorded with side group Slash's Snakepit and supergroup Velvet Revolver.
The .38-caliber Taurus revolver was recovered by police and had three live rounds in the chamber.
